description: CompositionCream pleated kurta with lace detailing on the yoke, made of 100% cotton, has pleats starting from the torso and three-quarter sleevesFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this kurta from w!
